mapper.insert: INSERT INTO queues (queue_type, group_id, position) VALUES (#{queueType}, #{groupId}, #{position})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM queues WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND queue_type = #{queueType}
mapper.select: SELECT q.queue_id, q.queue_type, q.group_id, q.position, q.join_time, cg.call_number, cg.group_size, cg.start_time, cg.is_assigned, cg.shown_wait_message, cg.table_id FROM queues q JOIN customer_groups cg ON q.group_id = cg.group_id WHERE q.queue_type = #{queueType} ORDER BY q.position ASC, q.queue_id ASC
